## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::LayersMinus;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        LayersMinus { size: 20, color: "red" }
    }
}
```

## Tags
stack, pile, pages, sheets, paperwork, copies, copy, layers, remove, delete

## Categories
design, layout

## Source
[Lucide v1.14.0](https://lucide.dev/icons/layers-minus)
